The '''16th Fighter Squadron''' was a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] that was attached to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]]. [[Blue Flight]] was a part of the squadron. The squadron saw action during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] of [[16 ABY/Legends|16]]-[[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

{{Military-stub}}

*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
